sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94666" key="skeli/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκελ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, later form for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σχελίς</foreign> (q.v.). <sense n="II" id="n94666.0" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σκελλίς</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
